name: Outfitters Junior Graphic Printed T-Shirt
overview_desc: Fun and vibrant graphic tee for everyday play.

product_page.description: A soft cotton jersey tee featuring a high-quality urban print. Designed for durability and comfort during active play.
product_page.feature_resolution: 100% Cotton, Breathable Fabric, Machine Washable.

reviews.comment: Great quality, colors don't fade after washing.

name: Mothercare Pure Cotton Baby Romper
overview_desc: Ultra-soft romper with nickel-free poppers for sensitive skin.

product_page.description: Designed with a wide envelope neck for easy dressing and integral scratch mitts on smaller sizes. Made from the softest organic cotton.
product_page.feature_resolution: Nickel-free Snaps, Organic Cotton, Toe-safe Seams.

name: Hopscotch Floral Embroidered Party Frock
overview_desc: Elegant floral frock perfect for birthdays and celebrations.

product_page.description: A beautiful net frock with a soft cotton lining. Features intricate floral embroidery on the bodice and a stylish sash at the waist.
product_page.feature_resolution: Soft Cotton Lining, Concealed Back Zip, Premium Net Fabric.

name: Outfitters Kids Colorblock Hoodie
overview_desc: Warm fleece hoodie with a modern colorblock design.

product_page.description: A cozy addition to any winter wardrobe. Features a front kangaroo pocket and ribbed cuffs to keep the cold out.
product_page.feature_resolution: Fleece Lined, Contrast Panels, Durable Stitching.

name: Super Squad Cartoon Character T-Shirt
overview_desc: Features popular superhero prints that kids love.

product_page.description: Bright and colorful t-shirt featuring licensed character graphics. The fabric is treated for extra softness against young skin.
product_page.feature_resolution: Licensed Graphics, Ribbed Neckline, Non-Toxic Prints.

reviews.comment: My son loves the print, fits perfectly.

name: Flex-Fit Kids Denim Jeans
overview_desc: Stretchable denim with an adjustable waistband.

product_page.description: Hard-wearing denim that moves with the child. Includes an internal button-hole elastic for a customizable waist fit.
product_page.feature_resolution: Adjustable Waist, Five-Pocket Style, Stretch Denim.

name: Smart-Look School Uniform Shirt
overview_desc: Easy-iron formal white shirt for school days.

product_page.description: A crisp white button-down shirt made from a cotton-polyester blend to reduce wrinkling and maintain a sharp look all day.
product_page.feature_resolution: Easy-Iron Fabric, Reinforced Collar, Breathable Blend.

name: Arctic Blast Kids Winter Puffer Jacket
overview_desc: Insulated water-resistant jacket for extreme cold.

product_page.description: Thick padding and a faux-fur lined hood provide maximum warmth. The outer shell is designed to repel light rain and snow.
product_page.feature_resolution: Water-Resistant, Faux-Fur Hood, Thermal Lining.

name: Twinkle Toes Tulle Party Dress
overview_desc: Multi-layered tulle dress with sparkling sequins.

product_page.description: A fairytale-inspired dress with layers of soft tulle. The bodice is adorned with shimmering sequins and a large satin bow at the back.
product_page.feature_resolution: Multi-layer Tulle, Sequin Accents, Satin Sash.

name: Cloud-Soft Kids Cotton Pajama Set
overview_desc: Lightweight 2-piece sleepwear for a restful night.

product_page.description: Made from 100% fine cotton. The set includes a long-sleeved top and matching elasticated trousers with fun all-over prints.
product_page.feature_resolution: Elasticated Waist, All-over Print, 100% Cotton.

name: Bata Bubblegums Light-Up Sneakers
overview_desc: Fun sneakers with LED lights that flash with every step.

product_page.description: Part of the iconic Bubblegums range, these shoes feature a durable synthetic upper and a fun light-up outsole that kids love.
product_page.feature_resolution: LED Outsole, Hook-and-Loop Straps, Scented Soles.

reviews.comment: My son won't take them off! Very sturdy.

name: Nike Revolution 6 Next Nature Kids
overview_desc: Versatile comfort for little athletes on the move.

product_page.description: Made with at least 20% recycled content by weight. It has a lightweight, breathable design and soft foam for comfort in every stride.
product_page.feature_resolution: Breathable Mesh, Recycled Materials, Traction Sole.

name: Adidas Tensaur Run 2.0 Shoes
overview_desc: Durable running shoes designed for all-day playground play.

product_page.description: Features a sturdy one-piece EVA unitsole and top straps that make it easy for kids to pull them on and off by themselves.
product_page.feature_resolution: EVA Unitsole, Hook-and-Loop Closure, Non-Marking Sole.

name: Bata School Time Smart Black Shoes
overview_desc: Classic black uniform shoes built for durability and shine.

product_page.description: Genuine leather upper with a scuff-resistant coating. These shoes provide the support needed for long school days and recess.
product_page.feature_resolution: Scuff-Resistant, Padded Collar, Easy-Clean Leather.

reviews.comment: Lasts the whole school year easily.

name: Hopscotch Beach-Ready Kids Sandals
overview_desc: Water-friendly sandals with adjustable straps for summer fun.

product_page.description: Lightweight EVA footbed that provides cushioning. The quick-dry straps make these perfect for the pool, beach, or park.
product_page.feature_resolution: Quick-Dry Material, Flexible Sole, Adjustable Velcro.

name: Disney Mickey Mouse 3D School Bag
overview_desc: Spacious backpack featuring a 3D molded Mickey Mouse design.

product_page.description: This backpack features two main compartments, side mesh pockets for bottles, and padded shoulder straps for ergonomic carrying.
product_page.feature_resolution: 3D Molded Front, Padded Straps, Water-Resistant Fabric.

name: Hero Squad Cartoon Lunch Box
overview_desc: BPA-free insulated lunch box with popular character prints.

product_page.description: Keeps food fresh for hours. Features an easy-to-open clip and a separate compartment for snacks or fruit.
product_page.feature_resolution: BPA-Free, Insulated, Microwave Safe.

name: Tuff-Sip Kids Leak-Proof Water Bottle
overview_desc: Durable, easy-grip bottle with a pop-up straw.

product_page.description: Designed for small hands, this bottle features a carry loop and a leak-proof lid. Fits most school bag side pockets.
product_page.feature_resolution: Leak-Proof, Pop-up Straw, Impact Resistant.

name: Disney Frozen Elsa Embroidered Cap
overview_desc: Sun protection cap with beautiful character embroidery.

product_page.description: Adjustable snapback closure ensures a perfect fit. Features glittery details and high-quality character art from Disney's Frozen.
product_page.feature_resolution: Adjustable Snapback, Breathable Mesh Back, Glitter Finish.

name: Skmei Kids Colorful Digital Watch
overview_desc: Waterproof digital watch with colorful LED backlight.

product_page.description: A perfect first watch for kids. Includes alarm, stopwatch, and calendar functions. Built to withstand splashes and playground rough-and-tumble.
product_page.feature_resolution: 5ATM Waterproof, Alarm/Stopwatch, 7-Color LED.

reviews.comment: Tough watch, my son loves the light-up colors.
